title: lipochaeta lobata var. heterophylla
intro: Lipochaeta lobata var. heterophylla, also known as Kanaka hawane or Kanaka hawane 'Opu'u, is a type of flowering plant native to Hawaii. The plant has been used in traditional Hawaiian medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Lipochaeta lobata var. heterophylla include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and promoting wound healing. The plant can be prepared as a topical cream or salve, or as a tea for internal use, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
